    *   **(b) Inclined configuration:**
        *   Components: Combustion chamber, Inner recirculation zone, Edge vortex, Atomizing edge, Fuel film, Swirler, Atomizer, Fuel droplets, Combustion air, Flame.
*   **Figure 16:** The effect of the stepped wall in the staggered case on the recirculated flow between adjacent burners.
    *   **(a) Inline**
        *   Components: ORZ (Oxidizer-Rich Zone), streamline visualization
    *   **(b) Inclined**
        *   Components: ORZ (Oxidizer-Rich Zone), Nozzle axis, streamline visualization, RZ due to flow expansion resulting from area difference, RZ due to velocity direction, Reversed flow.

*   FFI (Flame-Flame Interactions)
*   OH* chemiluminescence
*   PIV (Particle Image Velocimetry)
*   ORZ (Oxidizer-Rich Zone)
